infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CourtQuest uses your location to show courts near you and track courts you've visited.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CourtQuest uses your location to track courts you've visited nearby.

plugins.photosPermission: CourtQuest needs access to your photos to set a profile picture.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: CourtQuest uses your location to track courts you've visited nearby.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: CourtQuest uses your location to track courts you've visited nearby.
